pages.text: In Neko Technology, some machines require a managing cat to operate. You'll need to tame cats and craft management blocks to put them to work. Simply place a cat in a management block, and it will bind to nearby machines, keeping them running.

pages.title: Managing Machines with a Cushion
pages.text: Place a cat on a Neko Cushion. Machines near the cushion will be managed and kept running.

pages.title: Managing Machines with a Cat House
pages.text: Use a Neko Box containing a cat to invite it into a Cat House. The Cat House will manage nearby machines within a certain range.
A Cat House can manage up to 4 machines at once.
